chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.285 — Time of Movement

A permit issued under this subchapter must specify the time in which movement authorized by the permit is allowed.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 812 (S.B.1571), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter must specify the time in which movement authorized by the permit is allowed.
